description: Likely preserves most of the input and edits a small set of cells based on local object or marker cues. Colors are preserved as a set, though positions may change. Primary structural cue: sparse change. Inferred transformation family: local edit.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_ba97ae07(I):
    x1 = objects(I, T, F, T)
    x2 = totuple(x1)
    x3 = apply(color, x2)
    x4 = mostcommon(x3)
    x5 = ofcolor(I, x4)
    x6 = backdrop(x5)
    O = fill(I, x4, x6)
    return O
